subject: [PATCH 3/4] mm: Fix demotion gfp by clearing GFP_RECLAIM after setting GFP_TRANSHUGE

reviews.author: David Hildenbrand
reviews.summary: The patch looks good and addresses the issue correctly. The fix is straightforward and should be applied.

2026-03-11.patch_summary: This patch series addresses a bug in the migration code where GFP_RECLAIM is cleared after setting GFP_TRANSHUGE, but it should be done before. The fix involves clearing GFP_RECLAIM after setting GFP_TRANSHUGE to ensure consistency with regular THP allocations.
